name: AMS-IX Route Servers
notes:
There are two physical nodes of route servers:

rs1.ams-ix.net is 80.249.208.255 and 2001:7F8:1::A500:6777:1
rs2.ams-ix.net is 80.249.209.0 and 2001:7F8:1::A500:6777:2

---
BGP Communities that are recognized from the Route Servers are documented in the following URL: https://www.ams-ix.net/ams/documentation/ams-ix-route-servers

---

All ASes participating in the Route Servers:
 - AS6777:AS-AMS-IX-RS
 - AS6777:AS-AMS-IX-RS-V6.

---

All AS-SETs announced in the Route Servers:
 - AS6777:AS-AMS-IX-RS-SETS (IPv4)
 - AS6777:AS-AMS-IX-RS-SETS-V6 (IPv6)

---
Official IRR DBs that are used from AMS-IX Route Servers to configure Prefix Filters:
        RIPE 
        ARIN 
        APNIC 
        AFRINIC 
        LACNIC 
        JPIRR 
        IDNIC

Unofficial IRR DBs that are used from AMS-IX Route Servers but with lower priority:
        NTT 
        LEVEL3 
        RADB

---
        Please visit https://www.ams-ix.net
        for more information on the AMS-IX Route Servers
        and details on the filtering options.
